title: Hadoop MapReduce Architecture
description: The "tools" directory is responsible for handling command-line arguments and printing out usage information for each command. The files in this directory collaborate by receiving input from the user and processing it to perform the desired actions. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a user-friendly interface for interacting with the Hadoop MapReduce framework.

TITLE: Hadoop MapReduce Architecture

DESCRIPTION:
The "tools" directory is responsible for handling command-line arguments and printing out usage information for each command. The files in this directory collaborate by receiving input from the user and processing it to perform the desired actions. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a user-friendly interface for interacting with the Hadoop MapReduce framework.
